languages.text: "С вашим званием... будем резать без анастезии, нам не впервой".

traits.locale_text: "С вашим званием... будем резать без анастезии, нам не впервой".

languages.text: "Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."
languages.original_text: "С вашим званием... будем резать без анастезии, нам не впервой".

traits.locale_text: "Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."
"Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."
"Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."

languages.text: "Angesichts Eures Rangs ... werden wir auf eine Narkose verzichten. Das wird nicht das erste Mal sein."
languages.original_text: "Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."

traits.locale_text: "Angesichts Eures Rangs ... werden wir auf eine Narkose verzichten. Das wird nicht das erste Mal sein."

languages.text: “考虑到您的级别……我们就不打麻药直接切了。反正又不是头一回。”
languages.original_text: "Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."

traits.locale_text: “考虑到您的级别……我们就不打麻药直接切了。反正又不是头一回。”

languages.text: « Étant donné votre rang, nous procéderons sans anesthésie. Ce ne sera pas la première fois. »
languages.original_text: "Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."

traits.locale_text: « Étant donné votre rang, nous procéderons sans anesthésie. Ce ne sera pas la première fois. »

languages.text: «Teniendo en cuenta su rango... procederemos a la incisión sin anestesia. No será la primera vez».
languages.original_text: "Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."

traits.locale_text: «Teniendo en cuenta su rango... procederemos a la incisión sin anestesia. No será la primera vez».

languages.text: "Mevkiniz göz önüne alındığında... Kesme işlemini anestezi olmadan yapacağız. Bu ilk olmayacak."
languages.original_text: "Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."

traits.locale_text: "Mevkiniz göz önüne alındığında... Kesme işlemini anestezi olmadan yapacağız. Bu ilk olmayacak."

languages.text: 「あなたの階級を考えると…麻酔なしで切ります。初めてではありません。」
languages.original_text: "Given your rank... we'll do the cutting without anaesthesia. It won't be the first time."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの階級を考えると…麻酔なしで切ります。初めてではありません。」
